seoTitle: How to Add an Email Account to QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Connect an email account to QuickBooks Online so invoices, payment reminders, and client communications send directly from your business email.
intro: Connecting an email account to QuickBooks Online lets invoices, payment reminders, and client communications go out directly from your business address instead of a generic system email. This guide covers linking your account and troubleshooting common connection issues.

steps.heading: Open QuickBooks account settings
steps.body: Go to the settings area where email and communication preferences are managed.

steps.heading: Connect your existing email account
steps.body: Choose to add an email account and follow the prompts to link your existing business email to QuickBooks.

steps.heading: Verify the connection
steps.body: Complete any verification steps required to confirm the email account is properly linked and authorized.

steps.heading: Test sending an invoice or reminder
steps.body: Send a test invoice or payment reminder to confirm it arrives from the connected email address as expected.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot connection issues if needed
steps.body: If the email doesn't connect properly, double-check login credentials and permissions, since some email providers require additional authorization steps.

faq.question: Can I use any email provider with QuickBooks Online?
faq.answer: QuickBooks Online supports connecting common email providers, though the exact setup steps can vary depending on which provider you use.

faq.question: Why would I connect my own email instead of using QuickBooks' default sending?
faq.answer: Connecting your own email helps invoices and reminders appear more personal and trustworthy to clients, since they come from your business address.

faq.question: What should I do if my email won't connect to QuickBooks?
faq.answer: Common fixes include rechecking your password, confirming two-factor authentication settings, and ensuring your email provider allows third-party app access.

faq.question: Can I automate invoice emails once my account is connected?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, you can set up automated invoicing and reminder emails to go out through your linked email account.
